studies.title: Patient survey on the usability of the Digital Health Application ViViRA for exercise therapy of nonspecific and degenerative back pain

_verification.reason: The study title explicitly mentions the Digital Health Application 'ViViRA' and its use for exercise therapy, which aligns with the described ViViRA App for musculoskeletal conditions.

_classification.reason: The study involves a patient survey on usability, which suggests an observational design rather than an interventional randomized controlled trial.

_classification.reason: The study involves retrospective data collection and anonymized statistical evaluation, which are indicators of real-world evidence rather than a randomized controlled trial.
